items.headline: 3 Stocks Estimated To Be Trading At A Discount Of Up To 36.2%
items.summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has remained flat, yet it is up 16% over the past year with earnings forecast to grow by 15% annually. In this environment, identifying stocks that are trading at a discount can offer potential opportunities for investors seeking value in a growing market.

items.headline: Why MercadoLibre (MELI) Stock Is Up Today
items.summary: Shares of latin American e-commerce and fintech company MercadoLibre (NASDAQ:MELI) jumped 3.2% in the morning session after President Donald Trump signaled a willingness to end the multi-week military conflict with Iran.

items.headline: Latin America’s Mercado Libre Pulls the Plug on Its Crypto Coin
items.summary: Latin America's e-commerce giant Mercado Libre quietly killed its Mercado Coin loyalty token—pivoting to its own stablecoin.

items.headline: MercadoLibre's fintech terminates its cryptocurrency Mercado Coin
items.summary: Mercado Pago, the fintech arm ‌of e-commerce firm MercadoLibre, said ‌on Tuesday it is discontinuing its cryptocurrency, ​called Mercado Coin, which it had launched in 2022 as part of its loyalty program.  * Mercado Pago said that since 2024 the ​focus has ​been onthe "Meli ​Dolar", a stablecoin ‌priced in U.S. dollars
